list.name: run_id
list.label: Run ID
list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT run_id AS __value, run_id AS __text FROM perps_executions ORDER BY run_id
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT run_id AS __value, run_id AS __text FROM perps_executions ORDER BY run_id

panels.title: PnL by Exit Reason
panels.description: Total realized PnL grouped by exit reason. Green = profitable, red = losing.

targets.rawSql: SELECT exit_reason AS "Exit Reason", ROUND(SUM(realized_pnl)::numeric, 2) AS "Total PnL ($)" FROM perps_executions WHERE status = 'closed' AND exit_reason IS NOT NULL AND ('${mode}' = 'All' OR mode = '${mode}') AND (${run_id:sqlstring} = 'All' OR run_id = ${run_id:sqlstring}) GROUP BY exit_reason ORDER BY SUM(realized_pnl) DESC

panels.title: Trade Count & Win Rate by Exit Reason
panels.description: Detailed breakdown: count, wins, win rate, avg PnL, total PnL per exit reason

targets.rawSql: SELECT exit_reason AS "Exit Reason", COUNT(*) AS "Trades", COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE realized_pnl > 0) AS "Wins", ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE realized_pnl > 0) / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0), 1) AS "Win Rate %", ROUND(AVG(realized_pnl)::numeric, 4) AS "Avg PnL ($)", ROUND(SUM(realized_pnl)::numeric, 2) AS "Total PnL ($)", ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (updated_at - created_at)) / 60)::numeric, 1) AS "Avg Hold (min)" FROM perps_executions WHERE status = 'closed' AND exit_reason IS NOT NULL AND ('${mode}' = 'All' OR mode = '${mode}') AND (${run_id:sqlstring} = 'All' OR run_id = ${run_id:sqlstring}) GROUP BY exit_reason ORDER BY SUM(realized_pnl) DESC

panels.title: trailing_stop
panels.description: Average realized PnL for trailing_stop exits

targets.rawSql: SELECT ROUND(AVG(realized_pnl)::numeric, 4) AS "Avg PnL" FROM perps_executions WHERE status = 'closed' AND exit_reason = 'trailing_stop' AND ('${mode}' = 'All' OR mode = '${mode}') AND (${run_id:sqlstring} = 'All' OR run_id = ${run_id:sqlstring})

panels.title: stop_loss
panels.description: Average realized PnL for stop_loss exits

targets.rawSql: SELECT ROUND(AVG(realized_pnl)::numeric, 4) AS "Avg PnL" FROM perps_executions WHERE status = 'closed' AND exit_reason = 'stop_loss' AND ('${mode}' = 'All' OR mode = '${mode}') AND (${run_id:sqlstring} = 'All' OR run_id = ${run_id:sqlstring})

panels.title: time_stop
panels.description: Average realized PnL for time_stop exits

targets.rawSql: SELECT ROUND(AVG(realized_pnl)::numeric, 4) AS "Avg PnL" FROM perps_executions WHERE status = 'closed' AND exit_reason = 'time_stop' AND ('${mode}' = 'All' OR mode = '${mode}') AND (${run_id:sqlstring} = 'All' OR run_id = ${run_id:sqlstring})

panels.title: heartbeat_stop_loss
panels.description: Average realized PnL for heartbeat_stop_loss exits

targets.rawSql: SELECT ROUND(AVG(realized_pnl)::numeric, 4) AS "Avg PnL" FROM perps_executions WHERE status = 'closed' AND exit_reason = 'heartbeat_stop_loss' AND ('${mode}' = 'All' OR mode = '${mode}') AND (${run_id:sqlstring} = 'All' OR run_id = ${run_id:sqlstring})

panels.title: kill_switch
panels.description: Average realized PnL for kill_switch exits

targets.rawSql: SELECT ROUND(AVG(realized_pnl)::numeric, 4) AS "Avg PnL" FROM perps_executions WHERE status = 'closed' AND exit_reason = 'kill_switch' AND ('${mode}' = 'All' OR mode = '${mode}') AND (${run_id:sqlstring} = 'All' OR run_id = ${run_id:sqlstring})

panels.title: reconciliation
panels.description: Average realized PnL for reconciliation exits

targets.rawSql: SELECT ROUND(AVG(realized_pnl)::numeric, 4) AS "Avg PnL" FROM perps_executions WHERE status = 'closed' AND exit_reason = 'reconciliation' AND ('${mode}' = 'All' OR mode = '${mode}') AND (${run_id:sqlstring} = 'All' OR run_id = ${run_id:sqlstring})

panels.title: Hold Time Distribution by Exit Reason
panels.description: Hold time in minutes bucketed into ranges, colored by exit reason

targets.rawSql: WITH buckets AS (SELECT exit_reason, CASE WHEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (updated_at - created_at)) / 60 < 5 THEN '00-05 min' WHEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (updated_at - created_at)) / 60 < 15 THEN '05-15 min' WHEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (updated_at - created_at)) / 60 < 30 THEN '15-30 min' WHEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (updated_at - created_at)) / 60 < 60 THEN '30-60 min' WHEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (updated_at - created_at)) / 60 < 120 THEN '60-120 min' WHEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (updated_at - created_at)) / 60 < 240 THEN '120-240 min' ELSE '240+ min' END AS bucket FROM perps_executions WHERE status = 'closed' AND exit_reason IS NOT NULL AND ('${mode}' = 'All' OR mode = '${mode}') AND (${run_id:sqlstring} = 'All' OR run_id = ${run_id:sqlstring})) SELECT bucket AS "Hold Time", COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE exit_reason = 'trailing_stop') AS "trailing_stop", COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE exit_reason = 'stop_loss') AS "stop_loss", COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE exit_reason = 'time_stop') AS "time_stop", COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE exit_reason = 'heartbeat_stop_loss') AS "heartbeat_stop_loss", COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE exit_reason NOT IN ('trailing_stop', 'stop_loss', 'time_stop', 'heartbeat_stop_loss')) AS "other" FROM buckets GROUP BY bucket ORDER BY bucket

panels.title: Hold Time Stats by Exit Reason
panels.description: Min, avg, median, max hold time in minutes per exit reason

targets.rawSql: SELECT exit_reason AS "Exit Reason", COUNT(*) AS "Trades", ROUND(MIN(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (updated_at - created_at)) / 60)::numeric, 1) AS "Min (min)", ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (updated_at - created_at)) / 60)::numeric, 1) AS "Avg (min)", ROUND(PERCENTILE_CONT(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (updated_at - created_at)) / 60)::numeric, 1) AS "Median (min)", ROUND(MAX(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (updated_at - created_at)) / 60)::numeric, 1) AS "Max (min)" FROM perps_executions WHERE status = 'closed' AND exit_reason IS NOT NULL AND ('${mode}' = 'All' OR mode = '${mode}') AND (${run_id:sqlstring} = 'All' OR run_id = ${run_id:sqlstring}) GROUP BY exit_reason ORDER BY AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (updated_at - created_at))) ASC

panels.title: Peak PnL vs Realized PnL by Exit Reason
panels.description: How much unrealized profit is given back at exit. Uses pca_signals data which has peak/trough tracking.

targets.rawSql: SELECT exit_reason AS "Exit Reason", COUNT(*) AS "Trades", ROUND(AVG(peak_pnl_bps)::numeric, 1) AS "Avg Peak (bps)", ROUND(AVG(trough_pnl_bps)::numeric, 1) AS "Avg Trough (bps)", ROUND(AVG(pnl_bps)::numeric, 1) AS "Avg Realized (bps)", ROUND(AVG(peak_pnl_bps - pnl_bps)::numeric, 1) AS "Avg Giveback (bps)", ROUND(CASE WHEN AVG(peak_pnl_bps) > 0 THEN 100.0 * AVG(peak_pnl_bps - pnl_bps) / NULLIF(AVG(peak_pnl_bps), 0) ELSE NULL END::numeric, 1) AS "Giveback %" FROM pca_signals WHERE resolved = true AND exit_reason IS NOT NULL AND peak_pnl_bps IS NOT NULL GROUP BY exit_reason ORDER BY AVG(pnl_bps) DESC

panels.title: Peak vs Realized PnL by Exit Reason
panels.description: Avg peak PnL (MFE) vs avg realized PnL per exit reason -- the gap is profit left on the table

targets.rawSql: SELECT exit_reason AS "Exit Reason", ROUND(AVG(peak_pnl_bps)::numeric, 1) AS "Avg Peak (bps)", ROUND(AVG(pnl_bps)::numeric, 1) AS "Avg Realized (bps)" FROM pca_signals WHERE resolved = true AND exit_reason IS NOT NULL AND peak_pnl_bps IS NOT NULL GROUP BY exit_reason ORDER BY AVG(pnl_bps) DESC

panels.title: Time Stops by Day
panels.description: Daily count and avg loss from time_stop exits

targets.rawSql: SELECT DATE_TRUNC('day', updated_at) AS time, COUNT(*) AS "Time Stop Count" FROM perps_executions WHERE status = 'closed' AND exit_reason = 'time_stop' AND ('${mode}' = 'All' OR mode = '${mode}') AND (${run_id:sqlstring} = 'All' OR run_id = ${run_id:sqlstring}) AND $__timeFilter(updated_at) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT DATE_TRUNC('day', updated_at) AS time, ROUND(AVG(realized_pnl)::numeric, 4) AS "Avg Time Stop PnL ($)" FROM perps_executions WHERE status = 'closed' AND exit_reason = 'time_stop' AND ('${mode}' = 'All' OR mode = '${mode}') AND (${run_id:sqlstring} = 'All' OR run_id = ${run_id:sqlstring}) AND $__timeFilter(updated_at) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Time Stop Detail (Recent)
panels.description: Recent time_stop trades with asset, direction, PnL, and hold time

targets.rawSql: SELECT updated_at AS "Closed", run_id AS "Run", asset AS "Asset", direction AS "Dir", ROUND(entry_price::numeric, 4) AS "Entry", ROUND(exit_price::numeric, 4) AS "Exit", ROUND(realized_pnl::numeric, 4) AS "PnL ($)", ROUND((EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (updated_at - created_at)) / 60)::numeric, 1) AS "Hold (min)", ROUND(z_score::numeric, 2) AS "Z-Score" FROM perps_executions WHERE status = 'closed' AND exit_reason = 'time_stop' AND ('${mode}' = 'All' OR mode = '${mode}') AND (${run_id:sqlstring} = 'All' OR run_id = ${run_id:sqlstring}) ORDER BY updated_at DESC LIMIT 30

panels.title: Heartbeat Stop Loss Detail
panels.description: All heartbeat_stop_loss trades with asset, hold time, and PnL

targets.rawSql: SELECT updated_at AS "Closed", run_id AS "Run", mode AS "Mode", asset AS "Asset", direction AS "Direction", ROUND(entry_price::numeric, 4) AS "Entry", ROUND(exit_price::numeric, 4) AS "Exit", ROUND(notional_usd::numeric, 2) AS "Notional ($)", ROUND(realized_pnl::numeric, 4) AS "PnL ($)", ROUND(CASE WHEN entry_price > 0 THEN ((exit_price - entry_price) / entry_price * CASE direction WHEN 'long' THEN 1 ELSE -1 END) * 10000 ELSE 0 END::numeric, 1) AS "PnL (bps)", ROUND((EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (updated_at - created_at)) / 60)::numeric, 1) AS "Hold (min)", ROUND(z_score::numeric, 2) AS "Z-Score" FROM perps_executions WHERE status = 'closed' AND exit_reason = 'heartbeat_stop_loss' AND ('${mode}' = 'All' OR mode = '${mode}') AND (${run_id:sqlstring} = 'All' OR run_id = ${run_id:sqlstring}) ORDER BY updated_at DESC LIMIT 50

panels.title: Shadow Exit Reason Breakdown
panels.description: Shadow (zero_cross) exit performance vs live exit mechanics from pca_signals. Shadow tracks what would happen if the position were held until z-score crosses zero.

targets.rawSql: SELECT shadow_exit_reason AS "Shadow Exit", COUNT(*) AS "Trades", ROUND(AVG(shadow_pnl_bps)::numeric, 1) AS "Avg Shadow PnL (bps)", ROUND(SUM(shadow_pnl_bps)::numeric, 1) AS "Total Shadow PnL (bps)", ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE shadow_pnl_bps > 0) / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0), 1) AS "Win Rate %", ROUND(AVG(shadow_hold_time_ms / 60000.0)::numeric, 1) AS "Avg Hold (min)" FROM pca_signals WHERE resolved = true AND shadow_exit_reason IS NOT NULL GROUP BY shadow_exit_reason ORDER BY SUM(shadow_pnl_bps) DESC

panels.title: Real vs Shadow: Side-by-Side by Exit Reason
panels.description: Compare real exit PnL with shadow (zero_cross) PnL for each real exit reason. Shows how much better/worse shadow performs.

targets.rawSql: SELECT exit_reason AS "Real Exit", COUNT(*) AS "Trades", ROUND(AVG(pnl_bps)::numeric, 1) AS "Avg Real (bps)", ROUND(SUM(pnl_bps)::numeric, 1) AS "Total Real (bps)", ROUND(AVG(shadow_pnl_bps)::numeric, 1) AS "Avg Shadow (bps)", ROUND(SUM(shadow_pnl_bps)::numeric, 1) AS "Total Shadow (bps)", ROUND(AVG(shadow_pnl_bps - pnl_bps)::numeric, 1) AS "Shadow Edge (bps)", ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE shadow_pnl_bps > pnl_bps) / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0), 1) AS "Shadow Better %" FROM pca_signals WHERE resolved = true AND exit_reason IS NOT NULL AND shadow_pnl_bps IS NOT NULL GROUP BY exit_reason ORDER BY AVG(shadow_pnl_bps - pnl_bps) DESC

panels.title: Cumulative PnL by Exit Reason (Execution)
panels.description: Running total of realized PnL split by exit reason. Shows which exit types accumulate profit vs destroy it.

targets.rawSql: SELECT updated_at AS time, 'trailing_stop' AS metric, SUM(realized_pnl) OVER (ORDER BY updated_at) AS value FROM perps_executions WHERE status = 'closed' AND exit_reason = 'trailing_stop' AND ('${mode}' = 'All' OR mode = '${mode}') AND (${run_id:sqlstring} = 'All' OR run_id = ${run_id:sqlstring}) ORDER BY time

SELECT updated_at AS time, 'time_stop' AS metric, SUM(realized_pnl) OVER (ORDER BY updated_at) AS value FROM perps_executions WHERE status = 'closed' AND exit_reason = 'time_stop' AND ('${mode}' = 'All' OR mode = '${mode}') AND (${run_id:sqlstring} = 'All' OR run_id = ${run_id:sqlstring}) ORDER BY time

SELECT updated_at AS time, 'stop_loss' AS metric, SUM(realized_pnl) OVER (ORDER BY updated_at) AS value FROM perps_executions WHERE status = 'closed' AND exit_reason = 'stop_loss' AND ('${mode}' = 'All' OR mode = '${mode}') AND (${run_id:sqlstring} = 'All' OR run_id = ${run_id:sqlstring}) ORDER BY time

SELECT updated_at AS time, 'heartbeat_stop_loss' AS metric, SUM(realized_pnl) OVER (ORDER BY updated_at) AS value FROM perps_executions WHERE status = 'closed' AND exit_reason = 'heartbeat_stop_loss' AND ('${mode}' = 'All' OR mode = '${mode}') AND (${run_id:sqlstring} = 'All' OR run_id = ${run_id:sqlstring}) ORDER BY time

panels.title: PnL by Asset and Exit Reason (Execution)
panels.description: Which assets are most hurt by bad exits? Breakdown of PnL per asset per exit reason.

targets.rawSql: SELECT asset AS "Asset", COUNT(*) AS "Total", ROUND(SUM(realized_pnl)::numeric, 2) AS "Total PnL ($)", ROUND(SUM(realized_pnl) FILTER (WHERE exit_reason = 'trailing_stop')::numeric, 2) AS "Trailing ($)", COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE exit_reason = 'trailing_stop') AS "Trailing #", ROUND(SUM(realized_pnl) FILTER (WHERE exit_reason = 'time_stop')::numeric, 2) AS "Time Stop ($)", COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE exit_reason = 'time_stop') AS "Time #", ROUND(SUM(realized_pnl) FILTER (WHERE exit_reason = 'stop_loss')::numeric, 2) AS "Stop Loss ($)", COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE exit_reason = 'stop_loss') AS "SL #", ROUND(SUM(realized_pnl) FILTER (WHERE exit_reason = 'heartbeat_stop_loss')::numeric, 2) AS "HB Stop ($)", COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE exit_reason = 'heartbeat_stop_loss') AS "HB #" FROM perps_executions WHERE status = 'closed' AND ('${mode}' = 'All' OR mode = '${mode}') AND (${run_id:sqlstring} = 'All' OR run_id = ${run_id:sqlstring}) GROUP BY asset ORDER BY SUM(realized_pnl) DESC
